description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wall-mounted cabinet or shelf unit with a minimalist design. The front features a combination of vertical wooden slats on one side and a smooth white panel on the other, creating a visually striking contrast. The lower section contains a set of three integrated drawers or compartments, finished in a light beige color, providing concealed storage. The frame is bordered with a wood finish, adding warmth and texture to the overall appearance. The sides and back are plain and white, emphasizing the clean lines and geometric form. There are no visible handles, and the design suggests a push-to-open mechanism for the drawers.
description: A modern wall-mounted cabinet with vertical wooden slats, white panels, and integrated beige drawers, framed in wood. The design is minimalist and handle-free.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's depth and layered construction, with a plain white and beige surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the vertical wooden slats, white panel, and three beige drawers, framed by a wood border.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the plain white and beige surfaces without visible features.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the wooden frame and the arrangement of the slats and white panel.
